# Changelog

All notable changes to Scrap Machine will be documented in this file.

The format is based on [Keep a Changelog](https://keepachangelog.com/en/1.1.0/).

## [Unreleased]

### Added
- New features

### Changed
- Changes in existing functionality

### Fixed
- Bug fixes

### Removed
- Removed features

### Security
- Security fixes

## [0.1.0] - YYYY-MM-DD

### Added
- Initial game scaffold: Phaser 3 + Vite + TypeScript
- Boot scene with title screen
- Project structure and coding standards
- CI/CD tooling and deployment skills
